en: Today, we shall learn the basics of letter writing.

en: Now, open your notebook and write a letter to your grandmother.

zh_example: Now, open your notebook and write a letter to your grandmother.
ja_example: Now, open your notebook and write a letter to your grandmother.

en: Write a letter to your grandmother about what you did in the holidays.
en_example: Write a letter to your grandmother about what you did in the holidays.
zh_example: Write a letter to your grandmother about what you did in the holidays.
ja_example: Write a letter to your grandmother about what you did in the holidays.

en: Then write to your aunt, telling her about your new bicycle.

zh_example: Then write to your aunt, telling her about your new bicycle.
ja_example: Then write to your aunt, telling her about your new bicycle.

en: Everybody, write the letter as homework and bring it tomorrow.

ja_example: Everybody, write the letter as homework and bring it tomorrow.

en: Just write a letter to anybody you need to talk to.

ja_example: Just write a letter to anybody you need to talk to.

en: I thought I would write a letter and clarify.

en: Please get a note from your mother tomorrow.
